cost_controls.note: Planning feasibility only. Stop for renewed approval above CAD 4 and stop unconditionally above CAD 10. Promotion still requires subscription-specific pricing, quota, ownership, deadline, and cleanup evidence.

required_preflight_gates: exact target and planner evidence identity match
evidence mount resolves to the managed evidence disk
NIC subnet and static address recorded
current identity and visible role assignments recorded
current OS-disk identity, size, SKU, OS type, Hyper-V generation, security profile, encryption or DES, zone when present, access policy, and delete option recorded
fresh subscription-specific pricing, SKU availability, and quota preflight passed
recovery owner, cost ceiling, and cleanup deadline approved

ordered_actions: flush pending evidence writes to the mounted evidence filesystem
record final evidence checkpoint identifier and SHA-256

isolated_restore_rehearsal.network_boundary: temporary isolated NIC with no production service path
required_proof: temporary disk source is the exact verified OS-disk snapshot
temporary VM uses the recorded Trusted Launch security profile
specialized OS disk is attached with create option Attach
VM Guest State and vTPM viability are proven
production evidence disk is not attached

evidence_required: rehearsal VM power state is PowerState/deallocated
running compute overlap is zero minutes

phases.evidence_required: authorization package, reviewed commit, exact target, unexpired approval
service, health, mount, filesystem, evidence readability, VM, NIC, disks, identity, RBAC, OS-disk recreation metadata, and subscription-specific cost and quota
source NIC and evidence disk verified Detach before maintenance; OS disk remains disposable only after exact-snapshot boot rehearsal and contract-backed rehearsal teardown

writer stopped and drained, writes flushed, final checkpoint ID and SHA-256 recorded, maintenance correlation recorded, collector service stopped, guest shutdown verified, and Azure PowerState/deallocated verified
evidence-disk and OS-disk snapshots captured only after deallocation and bound to the same maintenance correlation and final evidence checkpoint
provisioning state, source identity, size, generation, access policy, expiry tags, shared maintenance binding, and deterministic disk recreation metadata

exact snapshot copied to a temporary disk, specialized disk attached to an isolated Trusted Launch VM, boot and VM Guest State or vTPM proven, no production NIC or evidence disk attached, source VM remains deallocated, and temporary cost and cleanup limits preserved

rehearsal VM verified PowerState/deallocated; temporary rehearsal VM and temporary isolated NIC absent; source VM remains PowerState/deallocated; only verified OS-disk snapshot, verified evidence-disk snapshot, and approved temporary recovery disk may remain; running compute overlap is zero minutes

VM-only deletion after both snapshots, the exact-snapshot isolated boot rehearsal, and contract-backed rehearsal teardown are verified, with production NIC and evidence disk preserved and canonical OS-disk name expected to become reusable
production NIC, static address, subnet, evidence disk, both recovery snapshots, rehearsal evidence, teardown evidence, and canonical OS-disk name availability
Ubuntu 24.04 VM using the preserved NIC and evidence disk with canonical OS-disk name; NIC and evidence disk use deleteOption Detach and are re-read after creation
public network access Disabled and network access policy DenyAll
new principal recorded and approved role assignments recreated
cloud-init, mount UUID, service, health, durable write, restart persistence, identity, RBAC, and re-read Detach semantics
independent evidence, operations, security, and cost decisions
acceptance decision, exact cleanup confirmation, deletion proof before deadline, and actual temporary-cost evidence

rollback.decision: Quiesce and deallocate the source, create two consistency-bound snapshots, prove the exact OS snapshot boots in an isolated Trusted Launch rehearsal, tear down the rehearsal compute boundary, then delete old compute only if all recovery evidence passes; retain the canonical OS-disk name for replacement and recreate the prior VM from the verified snapshot if rollback is required.
source_preflight_required: security profile and Trusted Launch compatibility
encryption configuration and disk encryption set when present
snapshot_verification_required: Hyper-V generation and OS type are preserved
maintenance correlation ID matches the consistency boundary
final evidence checkpoint ID matches the consistency boundary
final evidence checkpoint SHA-256 matches the consistency boundary
execution, owner, and cleanup-deadline tags are present
cleanup deadline is no more than 24 hours after creation

metadata_required: security profile and Trusted Launch settings
encryption configuration and disk encryption set when present
recreation_contract.identity_rule: record the new system-assigned principal and restore only the approved RBAC allowlist
acceptance_required: prior OS boots under the reviewed security profile
same evidence filesystem UUID is mounted at /var/lib/servicetracer
collector service and local health endpoint succeed
durable write and restart persistence succeed
NIC, static address, identity, RBAC, and disk access policies match the rollback contract
NIC and evidence disk are re-read with deleteOption Detach before any failed-compute deletion

rollback.before_old_vm_deletion: Abort without deleting old compute unless the source was quiesced and deallocated, both snapshots share the final checkpoint binding, the exact OS snapshot passed the isolated Trusted Launch boot rehearsal, and the rehearsal VM/NIC teardown contract was verified.
rollback.after_old_vm_deletion: If replacement verification fails, remove only failed replacement compute after re-reading NIC and evidence-disk Detach semantics, recreate the canonical OS disk from the exact verified snapshot using Copy, recreate the prior VM using Attach with the preserved NIC and evidence disk, restore approved RBAC, and verify rollback acceptance.
rollback.evidence_disk_rule: Never discard, format, replace, restore over, or attach the production evidence disk to the isolated rehearsal VM.

unresolved_blockers: operational proof of the selected OS-disk snapshot recreation rollback
fresh authenticated subscription-specific cost and quota preflight
independent evidence-quality and security-and-identity approval of the final implementation
